reason: Agent QA-20260612-224717-llyl successfully received the message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and responded with "4" within 1 second.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully, showing SuperAgent application with sidebar containing two agents.
Found the "QA-20260612-224717-llyl" agent in the sidebar and clicked it — Agent page opened showing the agent home view with status indicator displaying "idle".
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status displayed as "idle" (ref=e62), which meets the requirement.
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the message input textbox — Message successfully entered in the input field (ref=e177).
Clicked the "Send message" button (ref=e314) — Message was sent and the chat view transitioned to show the conversation thread.
Waited for response — Agent responded immediately with the answer "4" within 1 second as shown by the "Worked for 1s" indicator.

Verified the response mentions "4" and took a screenshot — The agent's response clearly displays "4" (ref=e392), and a screenshot was captured showing the complete conversation with the message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and the agent's answer "4". The session was automatically named "Quick Math Question Session".
